ALPHA BUILD — vector data is stored UNENCRYPTED on disk.

Do NOT put real personal data, credentials, or sensitive
information into this vault. Encryption ships in V0.2 (task
T0.2.0) before any beta user receives the product.

See ADR-010 in HANDOFF.md for full context.

File last refreshed (UTC): 2026-05-10T13:24:14.013869600+00:00
